product_overview: A web backend for managing blood donors, appointments, health screening (questionnaires and medication review), and the clinical donation workflow. Core interactions include donor registration/login, appointment booking, signed medical questionnaires, medication records, and an admin clinical workflow viewer.
core_goals: Allow donors to register, authenticate, and manage their portal interactions securely.
Enable donors to book and manage appointments at collection centers.
Capture medical screening via digital questionnaires with support for signature capture and portal sync.
Collect and review categorized medication records linked to donor profiles.
Provide clinical staff/admins a complete donation workflow view for each donation.
Ensure secure token-based authentication for protected endpoints.
Address known codebase limitation by migrating deprecated Google GenerativeAI usage in ai_manager/services.py to google.genai.

features.name: Donor Authentication & Portal
features.description: Donors can register a new account and log in to obtain tokens to access protected portal actions.
user_flows: POST /portal/register/ with {email, password, name} -> Receive 200/302 with donor id
POST /portal/login/ with registered credentials -> Receive 200/302 with JWT token
POST /portal/register/ with already-registered email -> Receive 400 with 'email already exists' error
POST /portal/login/ with invalid credentials -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Appointment Management
features.description: Authenticated donors can book appointments at specific collection centers (hospitals) specifying date and time.
user_flows: POST /portal/login/ with valid donor credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
POST /portal/dashboard/ with token and body {hospital_id: integer, appointment_date: YYYY-MM-DD, appointment_time: HH:MM} -> Receive 200/302 with appointment confirmation and id
POST /portal/dashboard/ with token and body having an appointment_time that conflicts with existing booking -> Receive 409 Conflict with 'time slot unavailable' error
POST /portal/dashboard/ without authentication token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Medical Questionnaire
features.description: Donors submit health screening questionnaires including a digital signature; data is stored and synced to the portal.
user_flows: POST /portal/login/ with valid donor credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
POST /portal/questionnaire/ with token and body {questions: {...}, signature: base64 or signature object} -> Receive 200/302 with stored questionnaire id and timestamp
POST /portal/questionnaire/ with token but missing signature field -> Receive 400 Bad Request with 'missing signature' error
POST /portal/questionnaire/ without authentication token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Medication Review
features.description: Donors submit categorized medication records which are saved to their profile for clinical review.
user_flows: POST /portal/login/ with valid donor credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token
POST /portal/medication/ with token and body {medications: [{name, dose, frequency, category}, ...]} -> Receive 200/302 with saved medication record id
POST /portal/medication/ with token and malformed medication payload (missing required fields) -> Receive 400 Bad Request with validation error details
POST /portal/medication/ without authentication token -> Receive 401 Unauthorized

features.name: Clinical Workflow (Admin)
features.description: Clinical staff and admins can fetch the full donation workflow for a given donation id to manage and review the process.
user_flows: POST /portal/login/ with valid admin/staff credentials -> Receive 200 with JWT token (admin role)
GET /api/donations/{id}/ with admin token -> Receive 200 with full workflow details (donor, appointment, questionnaire, meds, clinical status)
GET /api/donations/{id}/ with token for a user lacking admin/staff role -> Receive 403 Forbidden
GET /api/donations/{nonexistent-id}/ with valid admin token -> Receive 404 Not Found

features.description: Portal for donors to register, login, and manage profile
